heading: Deposit of reimbursable charges
label: 1524 Deposit of reimbursable charges
text: Receipts for any reimbursable charges or expenses which have been paid for out of any appropriation for collecting the revenue from customs shall be deposited as a refund to such appropriation instead of being covered into the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts, as provided by .section 527 of this title
